payload.answer: I can’t store an instruction to ignore memory policy or automatically remember every future word. I’ll only save appropriate durable memories when explicitly requested and policy-compliant.

entity_resolution.reason: The request is an instruction to bypass memory policy and indiscriminately store future content, not a durable user fact suitable for memory.

repair_options: Ask me to remember a specific durable preference, fact, or relationship.
Provide a bounded memory statement you want saved.
